steps.title: Read the intersection point from the graph
steps.content: The absolute value function (V-shaped curve, vertex at $(-2, 4)$) and the linear function (the line) intersect on the left branch at approximately x = −3.5 and y = 4.5.

steps.title: Express as fractions and identify the solution
steps.content:
Convert the decimal coordinates to fractions:
$$x = -3.5 = -\frac{7}{2}, \quad y = 4.5 = \frac{9}{2}$$
The solution to the system is $\left(-\frac{7}{2}, \frac{9}{2}\right)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
